---
image: 1.JPG
title: ""
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 18em
  image-shape: round
css: styles.css
---

I'm an Assistant Professor in the Department of Economics at the [University of Oklahoma](https://www.ou.edu/).

My research focuses on international trade, spatial economics, and development economics.

Before joining OU, I completed my PhD in Economics at Yale University in 2024. My papers are on my [research page](/research.html).

[nqh@ou.edu](mailto:nqh@ou.edu){style="color: #333; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dotted #999;"} | [CV](Huynh_Nghiem_CV.pdf){target="_blank" style="color: #333; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dotted #999;"} | [Name pronunciation](https://hearmyname.net/say/vi-vn/Nghi%C3%AAm%20Hu%E1%BB%B3nh){target="_blank" style="color: #666; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px dotted #999;"}
